heading: Removal of debtor in possession
label: 1185 Removal of debtor in possession
notes: Effective DateSection effective 180 days after , see , set out as an Effective Date of 2019 Amendment note under .Aug. 23, 2019section 5 of Pub. L. 116–54section 101 of this title
amendments: Effective DateSection effective 180 days after , see , set out as an Effective Date of 2019 Amendment note under .Aug. 23, 2019section 5 of Pub. L. 116–54section 101 of this title

children.heading: .—In General
children.label: a .—In General
children.text: On request of a party in interest, and after notice and a hearing, the court shall order that the debtor shall not be a debtor in possession for cause, including fraud, dishonesty, incompetence, or gross mismanagement of the affairs of the debtor, either before or after the date of commencement of the case, or for failure to perform the obligations of the debtor under a plan confirmed under this subchapter.

children.heading: .—Reinstatement
children.label: b .—Reinstatement
children.text: On request of a party in interest, and after notice and a hearing, the court may reinstate the debtor in possession.
